import { describe, it, expect } from "vitest";

describe("cart", () => {
  it("adds an item", async () => {
    await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, 500));
    const cart = addItem(emptyCart(), "sku-1");
    expect(cart.count).toBe(1);
  });

  it("total reflects quantity", () => {
    const cart = addItem(emptyCart(), "sku-1", 4);
    expect(cart.total).toEqual(4 * 250);
  });
});
